subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the peerless Lord Who, notwithstanding the upheavals of the world, the hatred of certain peoples and the calumnies of the slanderers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خداوند بیمانند را که مع انقلاب عالم و بغضای بعضی امم و مفتریات مفترین و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for teaching, @personal instructions
